titleStmt.title: SII 6.160: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 160. (A.R. No. 200 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakalaparamavaṁśōdbhava bhāradvājagōtra kaṭvāṁgaddhvaja riṣabhalāṁcana kāṁcīpuravarēśva
ra kaḍvāyiparaghōṣaṇa pallavakulatilakapādāṁbujasēvita Annuvakāmakulādhināya
ka Anēkabaṁdhujanāśraya patihitābharaṇa patimeccugaṁḍa gaṁḍarābharaṇa nōḍuvaḍi sāhasā¨rjju
na saṁgrāmarāma samaraikabhīma ḍakkunūḍlasāsanādhipa viprakulāśraya śrīvēṁggidēśacālukyanaṁkakāṟa pa
ramaṇḍalacūṟakāṟa patidēvagurudvijabhaktuṇḍunu kuṟamaṟajamuṇḍunaina mahāmaṇḍalika bhīmenāyakuṇḍu .
vibhrājamānō bhuvi puṇyakī¨rtyā bhīmāhvayaḥ śau¨ryyaguṇādiśālī . śrīmānayaṁ paṁgayanētrusū
nu¨rbādāṁbikānaṁdamahōdadhīṁduḥ . dīpadvayaṁ bhāvasurēśvarāya prādādvibhūttye paramēśvarā
ya . Ācaṁdratāraṁ bhuvi puṇyakī¨rttipradānadakṣaṁ harayē varāya . śākābdē nayanēṣu khēṁdugaṇi
tē bhīmāhvayōkhaṇḍitaṁ prādāddīpayugaṁ vasaṁtaviṣuvē kī¨rttiprabhāmuṣṇavē . bhrājadbhīmagabhīravā
rivibhavaśrīdakṣiṇāṁbhōnidhēḥ pārē saṁhatayā śrībhāvadēvāya tatu . śakhava¨rṣa 1052 gu
nēṇṭi viṣuvusaṁkrāṁti nimityamuna kammanāṇṭi prēṁpalli śrī bhāvanārāyaṇadēvaraku Ācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṇḍava¨rtti diviyalu
reṇṭiki niccina modavulu 50 . vīniṁ jēkoni prēṁppalli kariyaĀkaṇḍu tana putrānupavitrikamu nitya maḍḍeṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgga
lavāṇḍu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ jvā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
